ZILLI's high-end men's wool blend long-sleeve shirt seamlessly combines elegance and comfort, embodying the brand's commitment to quality and style. The shirt features meticulous craftsmanship and unique design concepts, setting trends with its classic yet modern silhouette that prioritizes comfort and freedom of movement. This collection embodies the brand's signature style and traditional craftsmanship, elevating the new season's fashion aesthetics with a sophisticated and refined color palette. A must-have for those who appreciate quality, aesthetics, and fabric details. Size: -

🧧Top quality🌹【ZILLI】trade company channel goods. Spring/summer new ZILLI men's casual silk cotton round neck short-sleeved T-shirt. ZILLI is a family-owned French luxury brand specializing in high-end menswear. Founded in year by Alain Schimel. ZILLI, known for its top-notch leather jacket designs and innovation, is a pioneer in men's fashion and a leader in the high-end menswear market. This item's design style continues the brand's consistent tone, maintaining a pure and natural minimalist route with clean and sophisticated tailoring, showcasing minimalist aesthetic to the extreme. Adorned with a brand embroidered badge on the chest, visually stunning and fashionable! Made with top-grade Japanese fabric, this material is incredibly luxurious, elevating fabric quality to top-tier standards, with a soft and delicate touch, smooth as silk, offering unimaginable comfort. Noteworthy for its environmental friendliness and breathability, this fabric is truly exceptional. The basic colors are versatile and highly mixable, suitable for both business and casual wear, ageless in style, making it an excellent wardrobe piece! Colors: white, black, navy, army green.
